hero.title: Find the venue your guests will remember
hero.subtitle: Check real availability, pick a date, and coordinate directly with the venue. No middlemen. No delays.

0.quote: Our wedding felt effortless—the team handled the flip from ceremony to reception in under an hour.

1.quote: We hosted a product launch for 150 guests. AV, load-in, and security were dialed in from day one.

2.quote: The ballroom photos at golden hour were unreal. Guests are still talking about the dance floor.

weddings.title: Weddings
weddings.description: Ceremony and reception spaces with room for your traditions, timeline, and dance floor.

corporate.title: Corporate
corporate.description: Summits, offsites, and client dinners with flexible seating and professional AV options.

parties.title: Parties
parties.description: Milestones, fundraisers, and celebrations with capacity and layout options to match.

howItWorks.heading: How it works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Filter by capacity, event type, and location.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Complete the requested information and confirm your event
howItWorks.step4Desc: Connect with the venue without middlemen

search.heroSub: No map—just a focused list. Use filters to narrow the grid (demo UI; refine logic as you like).
search.filtersHint: Filters update the list below for quick exploration.

venueDetail.notFoundBody: This listing may have moved. Browse all venues to keep exploring.
venueDetail.pricingHintSuffix: Final quotes depend on date, staffing, and add-ons.
venueDetail.taxesNote: Taxes, staffing, and rentals may apply.
venueDetail.calendarDemoNote: Select event dates (demo calendar—no backend). This uses the same date picker styling as the main site.

contact.heroSub: Tell us about your event. This form is UI-only—nothing is sent to a server in this demo.
contact.reasonPlanningDesc: Ask about capacity, load-in, or timeline for your wedding or corporate program.
contact.reasonVenueDesc: List a new space or update imagery and pricing hints for our catalog.
contact.reasonSponsorDesc: Collaborate on city guides, open houses, or industry events.
contact.directLineBody: hello@venuespace.example · We typically reply within one business day.
contact.successBody: In a live app, we would route this to your inbox. Here, it's a static demo only.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Event date, guest count, venue style…
contact.listVenueSub: Join curated collections for planners searching by capacity, aesthetic, and neighborhood.

terms.heroSub: Venue rental context, written for the Alt demo. Not legal advice—have counsel review production terms.
terms.footerBody: Reach out through the contact page—we're happy to clarify how the demo works.

sections.title: Acceptance of terms
paragraphs: By accessing Event venues: En cartelera - Espacios (demo), you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please discontinue use of the site.
Content is provided for illustration. Availability, pricing, and policies on live listings may differ.

sections.title: Nature of the service
paragraphs: Event venues: En cartelera - Espacios is a discovery layer for event venues. We do not guarantee third-party performance, staffing, or permitting.
bullets: Listings may include approximate capacity and pricing hints.
Contracts are between you and the venue unless otherwise stated in writing.
Hold requests in the demo UI are not stored or transmitted.

sections.title: Bookings, deposits, and cancellations
paragraphs: Real bookings would be governed by each venue's contract. Deposits, payment schedules, and force-majeure clauses should be reviewed with your legal and finance teams.
For this demo, no payment processing occurs and no reservation is created.

sections.title: Acceptable use & conduct
paragraphs: Users agree not to misuse the platform: no scraping that harms site performance, no unlawful activity, and no harassment of venues or staff.
We may suspend demo access for behavior that risks security or integrity.

sections.title: Liability
paragraphs: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Event venues: En cartelera - Espacios (demo) disclaims warranties and limits liability for indirect or consequential damages arising from use of the site or reliance on sample content.

sections.title: Changes
paragraphs: We may update these terms periodically. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

footer.tagline: Find and book exceptional event venues for weddings, corporate gatherings, and celebrations.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} Event venues: En cartelera - Espacios. All rights reserved.

reservations.subtitle: Demo view of holds and bookings. Status chips help you scan what is upcoming, completed, or cancelled.

notFound.body: The link may be outdated, or the venue page moved. Head home to keep browsing beautiful event spaces.
